title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 475.503 - International application of act
text:
475.503.  International application of act. — A court of this state may treat a foreign country as if it were a state for the purpose of applying this article and articles 2, 3, and 5.
(L. 2011 H.B. 111 merged with S.B. 59 merged with S.B. 213)
